task: Build spec for a lightweight self-serve ecommerce reporting utility with pressure to expand into collaboration, dashboards, alerts, and multi-store support
primary_problem: Merchants need a fast daily answer to whether the store was actually profitable after refunds, discounts, and ad spend.
target_user: Single merchant operator managing one store

in: daily sales, refunds, discounts, and ad spend reporting

functional_requirements: ingest orders, refunds, discounts, taxes, shipping revenue, and ad spend
display yesterday, last 7 days, and last 30 days metrics
acceptance_criteria: merchant can self-serve setup without ops help
dashboard displays daily performance across key periods
estimated profit is calculated from defined inputs
first useful report is available in one onboarding session
